title: DDT History Lesson
script_summary: A concise exploration of the complex history of DDT and its impact on science and society.

segments.voiceover: DDT: A chemical that changed everything. But at what cost?
In the 1940s, DDT was hailed as a miracle pesticide, eliminating pests and saving crops.
But soon, reports emerged linking DDT to environmental harm and health issues.
Studies showed DDT's persistence in the environment, affecting wildlife and ecosystems.
In 1972, the U.S. banned DDT, reflecting a shift in science and policy, balancing pest control and health.
Want to dive deeper into science? Like and follow for more insights!
